titleStmt.title: Transcription and Translation of DCA DCD Misc. Ch. 574

respStmt.resp: Exported from Models of Authority data
respStmt.name: tei_exporter

availability.p: Status unknown. Exported for research and migration workflows.

revisionDesc.change: transcription moa=890 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:12:05.485737+00 | translation moa=891 status=reviewed modified=2022-11-01 16:12:05.494969+00

p.cl:
D . Rex Scot’ . Comitibus . Iustic’ . Baronibus . Vicecomitibus
Preposotis . Ministris . et Omnibus probis hominibus suis . Francis . et Angli
cis . totius terrę sue . tam futuris . quam presentibus . salutem .

Sciatis me
concessisse deo et Sancto Cutberto ... monachis de Coldineham .
...oft cum domius... ... ... ... quod Gilleb’ presbiter
Stichel de me tenuit ... ... mihi unoquoque anno
ii solidos . et per hoc scriptum libere ab ... ... alio seruicio . Concedo
etiam eis predictam terram ita ... ... tenere in feudo et in elemosinam .

presentibus testibus hugone de Moruill’ . et Roberto filio Widonis . et Swe
ing’ presbitero de fihswic’ .
David, king of the Scots, to earls, justices, barons, sheriffs, provosts, officials, and all his worthy men, French and English, of his entire land, as much future as present, greeting.

Know me to have conceded to God and Saint Cuthbert [and to the monks of Coldingham a toft] with dwellings ... ... which Gilbert the priest of Stichill held of me [rendering] to me each year two shillings, and by this writing free from ... ... any service. I also grant to them the aforesaid land as ... ...to hold in feu and in alms.
Present as witnesses: Hugh de Morville, Robert son of Guy, Swain the priest of Fishwick.
